Most items in the mailbox have deadlines, however, ​​​there aren't any deadlines for cards and shards acquired from the Gacha.

Data Transfer

{|id="w" class="wikitable" cellspacing="1/6" cellpadding="2" border="1" align="center" width="100%"
!colspan="7" style="color:#006b02; background:#006b02;"| Data Transfer 
|-
!style = "background-color:#008d02"| Procedure 
|-
|style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"|First, you must remember that switching OS will delete all your G-Stones.

To transfer your data, you have to generate a transfer code and make a password. For this, you need to go to the in-game menu, then select the tab with a ring. Now you can make your password. Once you confirm it, the game will give you a transfer code. Screenshot it. You can go on your new device now. On the login screen, tap on the yellow button at the top left. Choose the 3rd option and input the transfer code and password.
|}

Quests

{|id="w" class="wikitable" cellspacing="1/6" cellpadding="2" border="1" align="center" width="100%"
!colspan="7" style="color:#006b02; background:#006b02;"| Quest Select

{| class="article-table" border="0" cellspacing="1" cellpadding="1" style="width:100%;"
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Story Quest
| style="text-align:center;" |It is an original story about your adventures in G.I.2 alongside Sufika, Gon and Killua. You can obtain characters are rewards in this mode. You can also find translations for the Original Story here.
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Recollection
| style="text-align:center;" |Here you can play quests and enjoy stories from the Hunter × Hunter anime adaptation. You can obtain characters are rewards in this mode.
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Event
| style="text-align:center;" |Play various events. You can find more details here.
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Heavens Arena
| style="text-align:center;" |A mode where you can fight against other player's teams.
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Tower Quest
| style="text-align:center;" |A ranking mode that refreshes every month. Get to higher floors to get more rewards!
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Challenge Quest
| style="text-align:center;" |A difficult solo mode for earning specific shards/rewards.
|-
|}
|}

Characters

{|id="w" class="wikitable" cellspacing="1/6" cellpadding="2" border="1" align="center" width="100%"
!colspan="7" style="color:#006b02; background:#006b02;"| Character Detail 
|-
!style = "background-color:#008d02"| Interface 
!style = "background-color:#008d02"| Translation Table 
|-
!style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"|
|style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"|Once you get 20 shards for a character, you can unlock that character. If you get more shards, you can further increase that character’s stats by "awakening" them.

It is impossible to have duplicates as extra shards can only be used to awaken the character.

They also have their own specific skill. Using it doesn't consume any resources, and it has a cooldown.

The AP bar increases whenever your character uses normal attacks.
{| class="article-table" border="0" cellspacing="1" cellpadding="1" style="width:100%;"
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |HP
| style="text-align:center;" |When it reaches 0, your character will be unavailable until the end of the quest
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |AP
| style="text-align:center;" |Consumed when using cards' skills
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |攻撃力
| style="text-align:center;" |Attack
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |防御力
| style="text-align:center;" |Defense
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |会心
| style="text-align:center;" |Critical rate
|}
|}

Attributes

{|id="w" class="wikitable" cellspacing="1/6" cellpadding="2" border="1" align="center" width="100%"
!colspan="7" style="color:#006b02; background:#006b02;"| Attributes 
|-
!style = "background-color:#008d02"| Attribute Icons 
!style = "background-color:#008d02"| Explanation 
|-
!style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"|
|style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"|Characters have different attributes (rock > scissors > paper > rock ...). 

If you have an attribute advantage, you will do more damage. You will take more damage if you have an attribute disadvantage. 

Be careful; some enemies don't have any attributes. Therefore they inflict and receive neutral damage.
|}

Cards

{|id="w" class="wikitable" cellspacing="1/6" cellpadding="2" border="1" align="center" width="100%"
!colspan="7" style="color:#006b02; background:#006b02;"| Skill Cards 
|-
!style = "background-color:#008d02"| Menu 
!style = "background-color:#008d02"| Translation Table 
|-
!style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"|
|style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"| Card Equipment 
 You can equip up to 3 of them on each character. They give bonus stats, and passive points and they each have an active skill that consumes AP upon use. It also has a short cool-down. They can't be awakened/limit broken. 
|-
!style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"|
|style = "background-color:#D1D0CE"| Card Composition 
 You can fuse cards with the same name and rarity. Use can also use +SKILL cards to level up the skill, increase the skill's effects and sometimes decrease the amount of AP consumed. Be careful, though; the skill level up isn't guaranteed. 
|}

How to Obtain

How to play

Game Mechanics

 

Passive points

Please check this page.

Swipe to dash. Sometimes you can see a hitbox for the upcoming enemy's attack. It means that the attack will do an important amount of damage. Swipe to get out of the hitbox and dodge it!

When you see a yellow exclamation mark, the enemy will do a deadly attack. You can either dodge it or interrupt it. Check what can interrupt the enemy's attack near his HP bar. You can stun him, blow him back or knock him down. Be careful; the temporary disable effect (for example, Black Voice) does not work against bosses!

The attack can't be stopped when the exclamation mark is red! You have to dodge it!

Auto mode

Activate this to use the auto mode:

Skills' Effects

You can find more information here.

Crowd Controls

{| class="article-table" border="0" cellspacing="1" cellpadding="1" style="width:100%;"
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Temporary Disable
| style="text-align:center;" |Target is unable to move or attack for a short period of time (Does not work against bosses)
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Stun
| style="text-align:center;" |Target is unable to move or attack for a certain time
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Blow Back
| style="text-align:center;" |Target is blown away and can't move while being blown away
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Knock Down
| style="text-align:center;" |Target is moved backward, knocked down and can't move during the knock down
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Attract
| style="text-align:center;" |Target is moved toward the attacker and can't move away
|}

| style="text-align:center;" |Keep inflicting a certain amount of damage to the target
|}

{| class="article-table" border="0" cellspacing="1" cellpadding="1" style="width:100%;"

|-

| style="text-align:center;" |Reduces damage taken
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Move Speed Increase
| style="text-align:center;" |Increases your move speed
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Critical Rate Increase
| style="text-align:center;" |Increases your critical rate
|}

Gimmicks

Bosses and sometimes common enemies use gimmicks. Passive boosts can only counter those gimmicks.

Please note that those passive boosts only work against gimmicks.

For instance, Restriction Removal doesn't have any effects against move speed decrease inflicted by skills.
{| class="article-table" border="0" cellspacing="1" cellpadding="1" style="width:100%;"
|-
! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |
Gimmick
! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Effect
! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Counter
|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Shield
| style="text-align:center;" |Casts a shield. The user is invulnerable to damage and skills' effects until the shield is destroyed
| style="text-align:center;" |Shield Breaker

|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Lock
| style="text-align:center;" |Locks your character, makes him unable to move, attack or switch
| style="text-align:center;" |Lock Counter

|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Restrict
| style="text-align:center;" | Reduces move speed and attack speed. Increases cool down's durations
| style="text-align:center;" |Restriction Removal

|-
! scope="row" style="text-align:center;" |Enhance
| style="text-align:center;" | The enemy prepares a powerful skill or buff for a few seconds. It can only be canceled by dealing a certain amount of hits on this enemy
| style="text-align:center;" | Enhance Stop

|-
! style="text-align:center;" | Drain
| style="text-align:center;" | Drains your character's AP at regular intervals
| style="text-align:center;" | Anti Drain

|}
 

Materials

 

Materials used to level up characters. You can get them through quests or missions. 

Materials are used to limit break characters and increase their maximum level. The color of needed materials changes according to the character's Nen type. You can get them through VS Quests.

The first one allows players to enhance the skill level of a card. The other ones allow players to level them up.  

Nen shards (blue flame) are used to unlock or awaken the corresponding character.

Awakening shards (red flame) can be used instead of classic shards to awaken any gacha character.
 

All Consumables, Materials, And Currencies

{|style="border: 1.5px solid #000000; border-radius: 7px; background: #F0FFF0; text-align: center; color: #000000;" width="100%" align="left"
!colspan="5" style="padding:5px; border-radius: 7px; font-size: medium; background:#228B22;" colspan="5"|Currencies
|-
!style="background: #32CD32; border: 1px solid #555555; border-radius: 5px;"| Currency
!style="background: #32CD32; border: 1px solid #555555; border-radius: 5px;" width="5%" | Name
!style="background: #32CD32; border: 1px solid #555555; border-radius: 5px;"| Description

|-
!
|style="background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #555555; border-radius: 5px;"| G Stone
|style="background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #555555; border-radius: 5px;"| A crystal stone with seven colors sparkling.
